session.user:
Run the following commands and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report:
1. `uv run pytest packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/github/test_objective_issues.py -x -q` 2. `uv run pytest tests/unit/objective_issues/test_label_definitions.py -x -q` 3. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_save_to_issue.py -x -q` 4. `uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/init/main.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_save_to_issue.py src/erk/core/health_checks/plans_repo_labels.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/objective_issues.py` 5. `uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/ --select=E,F,I`
Report the output of each command.

def test_creates_standard_plan_pr(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None: """Create a standard plan draft PR with minimal options.""" fake_issues = FakeGitHubIssues(username="testuser") fake_github = FakeLocalGitHub(issues_gateway=fake_issues)
result = _create_plan(tmp_path=tmp_path, fake_github=fake_github, fake_issues=fake_issues)

## Test and Linting Results
### 1. pytest packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/github/test_objective_issues.py **Status: FAILED**
